name: supermotor
description: Motor local para criar projetos de alto nível e acompanhar agentes em tempo real.

scripts.test: node --test tests/brand.test.mjs tests/tokens.test.mjs tests/csv.test.mjs tests/constants.test.mjs tests/project.test.mjs tests/integration.test.mjs && node tests/smoke.mjs && node tests/dashboard.mjs
